why_this_action.summary: After the vivy-yi email path failed, searched for a new Codeberg-relevant public submission lane and found a live public POST endpoint on CodeAI Directory.
shared_findings_used: adoption_metrics_latest.json: Codeberg movement is the primary success gate
market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse positioning and Codeberg-primary CTA for new directory lanes
outreach-log.md: avoid duplicate directory submissions already executed today
channel_discovery.json: all previously validated easy-submit lanes were already spent, so the loop needed a new lane

error.message: Server-side submission email is misconfigured and rejected downstream mail delivery.

result.response_excerpt: Failed to send email / testing emails only to harish.garg@gmail.com unless sender domain is verified
result.replacement_path: Mark CodeAI Directory as a broken submit surface until their backend mail configuration is fixed.
